content.query:
-- 1) Master key (solo si te lo pide; en muchos workspaces ya está)
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'ClaveSegura#12345';

-- Crear Base de datos
/*CREATE DATABASE superstore_db;
GO*/

--Seleccionar DB
use superstore_db

--Crear Credential
CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL cred_adls_managed
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';
GO

-- External Data Source
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE ds_superstore
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://adsldevsuperstore.dfs.core.windows.net/superstoredata',
    CREDENTIAL = cred_adls_managed
);
GO

--Crear Vista sales_by_region_month
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_sales_by_region_month
AS
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'gold/sales_by_region_month',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'ds_superstore',
        FORMAT = 'DELTA'
    ) AS rows;
GO

SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.vw_sales_by_category_month;


--Crear vista sales_by_category_month


CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_sales_by_category_month

SELECT *

SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.vw_sales_by_category_month;

--Crear vista top_products_profit

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW dbo.vw_top_products_profit

FROM
